title: Resolution Respectfully Requesting to the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw to Designate Skeleton Workforce in the Municipal Social Welfare and Development Office MSWDO) for the Continuance of the Delivery of Basic Services in the Municipality Especially the Damayan sa Kapwa Program.
